name: Caerphilly Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt together.
2. Rub in the butter until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Grate the Caerphilly cheese and stir it, along with the castor sugar, into the flour mixture.
4. Gradually add milk to the mixture until a soft, firm dough forms.
5. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and roll it out until it is about 2 inches thick.
6. Cut into rounds and place on a greased baking tray.
7. Brush the scones with milk.
8. Cook in a hot oven (425°F or Mark 7) for 10 minutes, until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with butter.
